title: cistus rosmarinifolius var. sedjera
intro: Cistus rosmarinifolius var. sedjera, also known as a variety of the rockrose plant, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, Cistus rosmarinifolius var. sedjera has been used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, offering various health benefits. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
